pi_items.source: Thesaurus.com, WordHippo, MakeUseOf, GeeksforGeeks - laptop and notebook are confirmed synonyms; ultrabook is Intel's specific term for thin/light laptops
Thesaurus.com, WordHippo, PowerThesaurus - all confirmed as synonyms for mobile devices with regional variations
WordHippo Thesaurus, Thesaurus.com - all confirmed as synonyms/interchangeable terms for audio devices
Vocabulary.com, Grammarist - all three are accepted spelling variations of the same garment

pi_items.verified_value: ["jacket", "coat", "parka"] (outerwear is a category term, not a synonym)
pi_items.source: Thesaurus.com, Columbia Sportswear, Merriam-Webster - jacket, coat, and parka are confirmed synonyms; outerwear is a broader category

privileged_info_summary: The task creates 5 search synonym groups in Magento admin. Four groups are well-verified: (1) laptop/notebook/ultrabook are established computing terms with ultrabook being Intel's specific category; (2) phone/smartphone/mobile/cellphone are confirmed synonyms for mobile devices; (3) headphones/earphones/earbuds/headset are confirmed interchangeable audio equipment terms; (4) tshirt/tee/t-shirt are all accepted spelling variations. The fifth group is partially verified: jacket/coat/parka are confirmed synonyms, but outerwear is a category term rather than a true synonym. The data is synthetic (created for the task) but uses real, legitimate English terms and reasonable ecommerce search groupings.
